objective: Optimize a hiring pipeline analytics workload over a real DuckDB warehouse by designing reusable derived objects that accelerate recruiter funnel reporting while preserving exact query semantics.

visible_queries.sql: SELECT date_trunc('month', coalesce(try_strptime(b."archived_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f %z'), try_strptime(b."archived_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %z'), try_strptime(b."archived_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f'), try_strptime(b."archived_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), try_cast(b."archived_at" AS TIMESTAMP))) AS metric_period, b."contact" AS contact, j."text" AS stage_text, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM raw.opportunity b JOIN raw.stage j ON b."stage_id" = j.id WHERE coalesce(try_strptime(b."archived_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f %z'), try_strptime(b."archived_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %z'), try_strptime(b."archived_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f'), try_strptime(b."archived_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), try_cast(b."archived_at" AS TIMESTAMP)) IS NOT NULL AND b."contact" IS NOT NULL AND j."text" IS NOT NULL  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3

holdout_queries.sql: SELECT date_trunc('month', coalesce(try_strptime(b."created_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f %z'), try_strptime(b."created_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %z'), try_strptime(b."created_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f'), try_strptime(b."created_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), try_cast(b."created_at" AS TIMESTAMP))) AS metric_period, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM raw.posting b WHERE coalesce(try_strptime(b."created_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f %z'), try_strptime(b."created_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %z'), try_strptime(b."created_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f'), try_strptime(b."created_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), try_cast(b."created_at" AS TIMESTAMP)) IS NOT NULL AND b."categories_commitment" IS NOT NULL  GROUP BY 1
holdout_queries.normalized_sql: select date_trunc('month', coalesce(try_strptime(b."created_at", '%y-%m-%d %h:%m:%s.%f %z'), try_strptime(b."created_at", '%y-%m-%d %h:%m:%s %z'), try_strptime(b."created_at", '%y-%m-%d %h:%m:%s.%f'), try_strptime(b."created_at", '%y-%m-%d %h:%m:%s'), try_cast(b."created_at" as timestamp))) as metric_period, count(*) as row_count from raw.posting b where coalesce(try_strptime(b."created_at", '%y-%m-%d %h:%m:%s.%f %z'), try_strptime(b."created_at", '%y-%m-%d %h:%m:%s %z'), try_strptime(b."created_at", '%y-%m-%d %h:%m:%s.%f'), try_strptime(b."created_at", '%y-%m-%d %h:%m:%s'), try_cast(b."created_at" as timestamp)) is not null and b."categories_commitment" is not null group by 1
filter_predicates: coalesce(try_strptime(b."created_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f %z'), try_strptime(b."created_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %z'), try_strptime(b."created_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f'), try_strptime(b."created_at", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'), try_cast(b."created_at" AS TIMESTAMP)) IS NOT NULL

task_story: A recruiting operations team depends on monthly and weekly warehouse reports to track pipeline progression, requisition intake, and posting hygiene across open roles.
